projects.name: Java GUI + MySQL University System
projects.description: Developed a desktop application with a Java GUI for a university system, implementing role-based login for teachers, students, and administrators, and integrating with MySQL to enable features like student registration and class search.

projects.name: Weather Forecast Mobile App
projects.description: Built a mobile weather app with Java (Android) frontend and Python (FastAPI) backend. Integrated the OpenWeather API for real-time forecasts, added offline caching, and applied clean system design principles to separate UI, backend, and services.

projects.name: Hybrid RAG System
projects.description: Designed a hybrid Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) system using Python, LangChain, Hugging Face Transformers, and PyTorch. Combined CRAG with web search and hallucination detection to improve reliability. Delivered a working PyQt5 frontend demo.
